title: Star Sprite
bio: Twila Flickerfeet is a star sprite who gets lost inside lampshades. She feels excited, wears tiny sock wings, and sprinkles brave little sparks on scary corners.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a simple five-point star for the body using soft rounded points. Add two tiny oval feet underneath.
steps.hint: Round each point so the star feels like a little pillow.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two bright oval eyes in the center. Add eager raised eyebrows and a tiny open smile.
steps.hint: Leave space around the face so the star points stay clear.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add small sock wings, sparkle dots around the points, cheek circles, and little motion lines near the feet.
steps.hint: Sock wings can be tiny rounded triangles with one stripe.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the rounded star, feet, face, sock wings, sparkles, and motion lines.
steps.hint: Smooth out each point so Twila looks soft, not poky.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the star body, wings, cheeks, and sparkles. Add a soft glow edge and a tiny shadow below.
steps.hint: A light glow around the points helps the sprite feel magical.
